name: Split Pea Soup C/p
recipeInstructions: This recipe requires a 5-quart crockpot. For a smaller pot, halve the recipe but use the same slow-cooking times. Combine veggies, ham bone, water and seasonings in slow cooker. Cover and cook on HIGH for 4 hours, then on LOW for 3-4 hours. OR cook on LOW for 9-10 hours. Remove ham bone. Prepare and add egg yolks by vigorously stirring some hot soup into the slightly beaten yolks with the sugar added. Blend into the soup and cook on HIGH until thoroughly heated (about 20 minutes). Set to LOW until serving time. Serve with croutons.
